name: L-Citrulline / Citrulline Malate
summary: A 'pump' and nitric-oxide supplement. Evidence for hypertrophy is lacking; a meta-analysis found modest reductions in post-exercise perceived exertion and soreness, but no clear performance or muscle-building effect.
effect: May slightly reduce perceived exertion and 24-48 h muscle soreness; no established effect on hypertrophy or maximal performance.
dosing: ~6-8 g citrulline malate pre-workout if used.
safety: Safe; may cause minor GI discomfort at higher doses.
